canonical_definition: Spatial Pathfinding Reasoning Challenge, a benchmark of 1,000 2D grid puzzles assessing spatial and rule-based reasoning through pathfinding under multiple constraints.
papers: Doubling Your Data in Minutes: Ultra-fast Tabular Data Generation viaLLM-Induced Dependency Graphs
